task_updates.executor_notes: Mounted `GallerySelectionProvider` in the composed app provider tree immediately after `PanesProvider`, keeping it available to descendants under both the layout-level pane tree and the video-editor subtree. Verified with the full `AppProviders.test.tsx` file plus repository typecheck.

Updated `AgentChatMessage` so attachment summaries render whenever a turn includes attachments, which keeps gallery-origin attachments visible in chat history when they carry `generationId`. Verified with the full `AgentChatMessage.test.tsx` file plus repository typecheck.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: The provider tree now inserts `GallerySelectionProvider` directly after `PanesProvider`, and the `AppProviders` test confirms descendants rendered under the composed tree can consume the gallery-selection context.

Attachment summaries no longer depend on the turn being a user turn, so gallery-style attachments that carry `generationId` still render correctly in chat history; the `AgentChatMessage` test covers that path.
